query:
SELECT 
  ac.name AS category,
  fi.name AS feedItem,
  COUNT(*) AS duplicateCount,
  GROUP_CONCAT(rp.id ORDER BY rp.id) AS allIds
FROM ration_plans rp
LEFT JOIN feed_items fi ON fi.id = rp.feedItemId
LEFT JOIN animal_categories ac ON ac.id = rp.categoryId
WHERE rp.deletedAt IS NULL AND rp.isActive = 1
GROUP BY rp.categoryId, rp.feedItemId, rp.qtyPerHeadPerDay
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY duplicateCount DESC;
